clips.title: Sundown
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day, dramatic grade. A blazing orange sunset over the ocean, the sky glowing, the sun low on the water. A silhouette shot: a person stands on the beach fully backlit, rendered as a pure dark silhouette against the fiery sky, features lost to shadow. A person in a flowing dress. Intense backlight, rich sunset color, 50mm, silhouette. Shallow depth of field, subtle grain, 24fps.

clips.title: The Doorway
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day, moody grade. A dark interior facing a doorway blazing with bright light beyond. A silhouette shot: a person stands in the bright doorway, rendered as a stark dark silhouette against the glow, edges rimmed with light. A person in a long coat. Hard backlight, deep black foreground, 50mm, silhouette. Shallow depth of field, subtle grain, 24fps.

clips.title: The Window
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day, atmospheric grade. A dim room with a large window filled with bright misty morning light. A silhouette shot: a person stands at the window backlit, a dark silhouette against the glowing pane, holding a mug. A person in loungewear. Soft bright backlight, hazy glow, 50mm, silhouette. Shallow depth of field, subtle grain, 24fps.

clips.title: The Ridge
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day, epic grade. A mountain ridge at dawn, the sky glowing behind the peaks, mist below. A silhouette shot: a person stands on the ridge fully backlit against the bright dawn sky, a crisp dark silhouette, arms slightly raised. A person in mountaineering gear. Intense dawn backlight, glowing sky, 50mm, silhouette. Shallow depth of field, subtle grain, 24fps.

clips.title: The Stage
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day, theatrical grade. A concert stage in fog, a blazing bank of stage lights behind the performer. A silhouette shot: a person stands center stage fully backlit by the lights, a bold dark silhouette in the haze, arm raised. A person in stage attire. Intense colored backlight, volumetric haze, 50mm, silhouette. Shallow depth of field, grain, 24fps.

clips.title: The Overpass
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day, urban grade. A city overpass at dusk, the glowing orange sky and distant skyline behind. A silhouette shot: a person stands at the railing backlit against the dusk sky, a clean dark silhouette, looking out. A person in a jacket. Warm dusk backlight, city glow, 50mm, silhouette. Shallow depth of field, subtle grain, 24fps.
